snippet.title: Thodi Der -Full Video | Half Girlfriend | Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor | Farhan S & Shreya Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Song - Thodi Der
Movie - Half Girlfriend
Singers - Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Farhan Saeed
Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan
Asst. Madhab Deka
Co-Arranged & Keyboards By Ali Mustafa
Acoustic And Electric Guitar By Ankur Mukherjee
Harmonium By Aditya Oke
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Vocals Recorded At Phatbox, (Mumbai)
Recording Engineer's - Pankaj Borah & Bhaskar Sarma
Song Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay)
Asst Mixing Engineers Michael Edwin Pillai & Lucky

Cast - Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor
Production House - Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer - Shobha Kapoor, Ekta Kapoor, Mohit Suri & Chetan Bhagat
Director - Mohit Suri
Welcome to Soulful Shreya Ghoshal Songs, your melodious corner dedicated to the timeless voice of Shreya Ghoshal вҖ” one of IndiaвҖҷs most celebrated playback singers. вңЁрҹҺӨ
Here, we bring you a heartfelt collection of her biggest hits, romantic melodies, and soulвҖ‘touching songs that have captured millions of hearts across the world.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DвҖҷSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorвҖҷs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“  аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )

en.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“  аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аҘҷаҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨқаӨҫ  , аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ—аҘӢаӨІаҘӮ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  , аӨ…аӨ¶аҘӢаӨ•  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨёаҘҒаӨ§аӨҫ  аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҰаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ•   - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө 
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ -  аӨҮаӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аӨ—аҘҒаӨЁ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨёаӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨө аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҰ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° вҖ“ аӨҸаӨ® .аӨ•аҘҮ .аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ (аӨңаҘүаӨҜ )
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҰаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨІаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ°аҘүаӨҜ  , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ 
аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  вҖ“  аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  ,аӨ•аӨ®аӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ   аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№   
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨЁаҘӣаҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC 
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ
B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө

B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ
аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ вҖ“ аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ 

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  -
 аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ 

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё-
 аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by Pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey weвҖҷll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek вң–пёҸ Swar вҖ” two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

Vek вң–пёҸ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

В© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade 
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Mere ang raja, jo tera rang laga
Toh seedhi-saadi chhori sharabi ho gayi

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya
Dugna nasha, kyun ho raha hai
Aankhon se meetha tune khilaya

Ho teri malmal ki kurti gulabi ho gayi
Manchali chaal kaise nawaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Teri kalaai hai, haathon mein aayi hai
Maine maroda toh lagti malaai hai

Mehenga padega ye chaska malaai ka
Upvaas karne mein teri bhalaai hai

Ho bindiya teri mehtaabi ho gayi
Dil ke armaanon mein behisaabi ho gayi

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Kyun вҖҳno-vacancyвҖҷ ki, hothon pe gaali hai
Jabki tere dil ka kamra toh khaali hai
(kamra toh khaali haiвҖҰ)

Mujhko pata hai re
Kya chahata hai tu
Boli bhajan teri
Neeyat Qawwali hai

Zulmi ye haazir-jawaabi ho gayi
Tu toh har taale ki aaj chaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa, Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

en-US.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
The Balam Pichkari tune that killed me
You said the world has become barren
My king, when your color touched me
The simple and simple girl has become drunk

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you getting double the intoxication? Yes,
I played a sweet tune with my eyes.

Yes, your muslin kurti has turned pink.

How did your playful gait become royal, then?

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Your wrist is in my hands.
I mean, it feels like a mala.

This addiction to mala will be expensive.
It's your goodness to abstain.

Your bindi has become your beauty.
It has become immeasurable in the desires of my heart.

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law. (x2)

Why are you cursing about 'no vacancy'?
When the room in your heart is empty.
(The room is empty...)

I know what you want.
You said your prayers.
Your intention is Qawwali.

O cruel one, you've become quick to reply.
You've become the key to every lock today, right?

The tune of "Balam Pichkari" killed me.
The simple, sari-clad girl became a drunkard.
Yes, the tune that struck me while I was wearing jeans,
Then I became the neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Yes, I said, the world has become barren.
Yes, I said, the world has become barren...

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

THE BOYS is an irreverent take on what happens when superheroes, who are as popular as celebrities, as influential as politicians and as revered as Gods, abuse their superpowers rather than use them for good. snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep OhlanвҖҷs allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages вҖ“ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal вҖ“ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime VideoвҖҷs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures вҖ“ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#aspirants #AspirantsOnPrime #trailer #officialtrailer #webseries #primevideoindia

Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ekвҒҹdafe

NeeleвҒҹphoolвҒҹlaau tere liye
KhatвҒҹlikhu tere liye
MaiвҒҹkhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
TРөri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terРө liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liyeвҖҰ

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. ItвҖҷs a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams вҖ” thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn - Neetesh Jung Kunwar
snippet.description:
Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn (Dibesh Pokhrel) - Neetesh Jung Kunwar

Listen to Desh Ko Maya on Spotify-

https://open.spotify.com/track/64hU7x4kdmzpWLgfIEMqyb?si=A-iCIo8WTJmqZrx8Gl2OFw

Listen to Desh Ko Maya on Apple Music-

https://music.apple.com/np/album/desh-ko-maya-feat-arthur-gunn-single/1881699953

Lyrics

аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨЎаӨҫаӨЎаӨҫ аӨ° аӨӘаӨҫаӨ–аӨҫ
аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨқаҘҲ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аӨҫ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ№аӨІ
аӨёаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨүаӨҹаҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ®аӨЁаҘҲаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨҡаӨ№аӨІ-аӨӘаӨ№аӨІ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ


аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаӨҫ аӨ° аӨЁаӨҰаҘҖ
аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаӨҫ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аӨўаҘҖ
аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ§аҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ-аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨ°
аӨ°аӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ
аӨӨаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘҲ аӨҜаҘӢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨЁаӨҫ

аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨқаҘҲ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨҸаӨЁаӨҝ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аӨҫ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ№аҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ№аӨІ
аӨёаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨүаӨҹаҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ
аӨ®аӨЁаҘҲаӨӯаӨ°аӨҝ аӨҡаӨ№аӨІ-аӨӘаӨ№аӨІ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҸ аӨ–аҘӢаӨІаӨҫ аӨ° аӨЁаӨҰаҘҖ
аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨҹаӨҫаӨўаӨҫ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аӨўаҘҖ
аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ§аҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ-аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨ°

аӨӨаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘҲ аӨҜаҘӢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨЁаӨҫ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚ аӨӨаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ
аӨҶаӨң аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨқаҘҖ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨӯаӨҝаӨЎаӨ®аҘҲ аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨүаҘ…аӨӮаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

аӨ§аҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨ® аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ-аӨ аҘӮаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨ°
аӨ°аӨ®аҘҚаӨӣаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ
аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ
аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ

Today we play Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 in which we are stuck in a Toy Factory. We run from Huggy Wuggy to escape this abandoned Toy Factory!

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
вҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜвҺҜ
вҖңTIMRO LOOKSвҖқ is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mindвҷӘ

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSssвҖҰ..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BROвҖҰ.

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2

snippet.title: Bairan вҖ“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatвҖҷs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

аӨ®аӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҶаӨҜаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨөаҘҮ аӨ–аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨІ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ

аӨ№аӨҫаӨҜ...

аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨӯ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ°аӨҜаӨҫ
аӨ аҘҖаӨ• аӨ•аҘӢаӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аӨҫаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҘ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘӮаӨҒ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ® аӨҰаҘҮаӨҰаҘҮ

аӨңаӨҝаӨӨ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҲ

аӨңаӨҝаӨӨ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҲ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨ–аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘҲ

аӨң аӨӨаҘӮ аӨҘаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨҳаӨ¬аӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ

hi.title: Bairan вҖ“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
hi.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatвҖҷs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

fr-FR.description:
J'ai arrГӘtГ©...

La fin de Blox Fruits...!?

Гүcoutez bien : ne cliquez sur aucun lien de profil Roblox. Si vous le faites, Г§a vous arrivera aussi.

J'ai essayГ© de changer mon mot de passe, mais le code n'arrivait jamais. Au bout de 1 Г  5 minutes, j'ai reГ§u un code, mais il Г©tait incorrect. J'ai dГ» cliquer 7 fois sur В«В Renvoyer le codeВ В». Dans la vidГ©o, je dis par erreur que j'ai changГ© de mot de passe 2 Г  3 heures plus tard, mais le code ne fonctionnait pas. AprГЁs 6 Г  8 heures d'attente, j'ai reГ§u un code valide, j'ai changГ© mon mot de passe, puis je n'ai plus reГ§u de code pendant 1 jour, puis 2 ou 3 jours, et enfin 3 jours plus tard, la nuit, j'ai essayГ© de le redemander et il est arrivГ© en 1 minute. Je l'ai changГ©. C'est un peu difficile Г  expliquer en anglais. Heureusement, tout est rentrГ© dans l'ordre maintenant. Aujourd'hui, j'ai changГ© mon deuxiГЁme mot de passe de sГ©curitГ© en В«В AuteurВ В»В !

pt-BR.title: Eu desisto...
pt-BR.description:
Desisto...

O fim do Blox Fruits...!?

Ok, entГЈo escutem, nГЈo cliquem em nenhum link de perfil do Roblox. Se clicarem, isso vai acontecer com vocГӘs tambГ©m.
Eu tentei mudar minha senha, mas o cГіdigo nunca chegou. Depois de 1 a 5 minutos, chegou um cГіdigo, mas quando o inseri, apareceu como cГіdigo incorreto. Talvez eu tenha clicado em "reenviar cГіdigo" umas 7 vezes. AlГ©m disso, no vГӯdeo, eu disse sem querer que levei de 2 a 3 horas para mudar a senha, mas na verdade o cГіdigo nГЈo funcionou. Depois de 6 a 8 horas, chegou um cГіdigo que funcionou e eu mudei a senha. Depois de mudar a senha, o cГіdigo nГЈo chegou por um dia, depois de 2 a 3 dias e, finalmente, depois de 3 dias Г  noite, tentei pedir o cГіdigo e ele chegou em 1 minuto e eu o mudei. (Гү um pouco difГӯcil explicar em inglГӘs.) Felizmente, tudo deu certo agora. Hoje, mudei meu 2Security para Auther!

+ Entre no meu Discord aqui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: Lo dejo...
es-US.description:
Renuncio...

ВЎFin de las frutas Blox!?

Bueno, escucha, no hagas clic en ningГәn enlace de perfil de Roblox. Si lo haces, esto tambiГ©n te pasarГЎ.
IntentГ© cambiar mi contraseГұa, pero el cГіdigo nunca llegГі. Entre 1 y 5 minutos despuГ©s, 45 minutos despuГ©s, apareciГі un cГіdigo, pero lo introduje y decГӯa que era incorrecto. QuizГЎs hice clic 7 veces para reenviar el cГіdigo. En el video, accidentalmente, a las 2 o 3 horas, cambiГ© la contraseГұa. O sea, el cГіdigo no funcionaba. Entre 6 y 8 horas despuГ©s, apareciГі un cГіdigo que funcionaba. CambiГ© la contraseГұa. DespuГ©s de cambiarlo, el cГіdigo nunca llegГі. Un dГӯa, dos o tres dГӯas despuГ©s y tres dГӯas despuГ©s, por la noche, intentГ© pedir el cГіdigo y llegГі en un minuto. Lo cambiГ©. Fue difГӯcil explicarlo en inglГ©s. Por suerte, todo saliГі bien. ВЎHoy cambiГ© mi contraseГұa de seguridad a la de autor!

it.description:
Ho smesso...

I frutti di fine Blox...!?

Okey, quindi ascolta, non cliccare su nessun link del profilo Roblox, se lo clicchi, succederГ  anche a te.
Ho provato a cambiare la mia password ma il codice non ГЁ mai arrivato. Dopo 1-5 minuti ГЁ arrivato 1 codice, ma quando l'ho inserito mi ha detto "codice sbagliato", forse ho cliccato 7 volte e ho reinviato il codice + nel video ho detto per sbaglio che dopo 2-3 ore ho cambiato password, cioГЁ il codice non funzionava. Dopo 6-8 ore ГЁ arrivato 1 codice, funzionava, ho cambiato password + dopo averlo cambiato il codice non ГЁ mai arrivato, poi dopo 2-3 giorni e dopo 3 giorni di notte ho provato a chiedere il codice ed ГЁ arrivato in 1 minuto e l'ho cambiato + un po' difficile da spiegare in inglese + per fortuna ora ГЁ andato tutto bene + oggi ho cambiato il mio 2security in auther!

de-DE.title: Ich gebe auf...
de-DE.description:
Ich hГ¶re auf...

Das Ende von Roblox Fruits...!?

Okay, also hГ¶rt zu: Klickt bloГҹ nicht auf Roblox-Profillinks! Wenn ihr das tut, passiert euch das auch. Ich habe versucht, mein Passwort zu ГӨndern, aber der Code kam erst nach 1-5 Minuten. Nach 45 Minuten kam dann ein Code, aber als ich ihn eingegeben habe, hieГҹ es, er sei falsch. Ich habe dann bestimmt sieben Mal auf вҖһCode erneut sendenвҖң geklickt. Im Video habe ich versehentlich gesagt, dass ich das Passwort vor 2-3 Stunden geГӨndert habe. Ich meine, der Code hat nicht funktioniert. Nach 6-8 Stunden kam dann endlich ein Code, der funktioniert hat. Ich habe mein Passwort geГӨndert. Nachdem ich das getan hatte, kam der Code einen Tag lang nicht, dann wieder 2-3 Tage und schlieГҹlich, drei Tage spГӨter, nachts habe ich versucht, einen Code anzufordern. Er kam innerhalb einer Minute und ich habe ihn geГӨndert. Schwer zu erklГӨren auf Englisch. Zum GlГјck ist jetzt alles gut gegangen. Heute habe ich meine Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung auf Autorisierung umgestellt!

Tritt meinem Discord-Server hier bei: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

id.title: Saya berhenti...
id.description:
Aku Menyerah...

Akhirnya Blox Fruits..!?

Oke, jadi dengarkan, jangan klik tautan profil Roblox apa pun. Jika kamu mengkliknya, ini akan terjadi padamu juga.
Aku mencoba mengubah kata sandiku, tetapi kodenya tidak pernah datang. 1-5 menit kemudian, 45 menit kemudian datang 1 kode, tetapi aku memasukkan kode tersebut dan muncul pesan kode salah. Mungkin aku mengklik kirim ulang kode 7 kali. + Dalam video, aku tidak sengaja mengatakan 2-3 jam setelah aku mengubah kata sandi. Maksudku, kodenya tidak berfungsi. Kemudian 6-8 jam setelah 6-8 jam, datang 1 kode, kode itu berfungsi. Aku mengubah kata sandi. + Setelah selesai, kodenya tidak pernah datang selama 1 hari, kemudian 2-3 hari, dan kemudian 3 hari di malam hari aku mencoba meminta kode dan kode itu datang dalam 1 menit dan aku mengubahnya. + Agak sulit dijelaskan dalam bahasa Inggris. + Untungnya, semuanya berjalan baik sekarang. + Hari ini aku mengubah keamananku menjadi Author!

+ Gabung Discord Saya di Sini: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | ValentineвҖҷs Special Love Song
snippet.description:
рҹ‘үрҹҸ» SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeвҖҰ
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeвҖҰ

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe рҹ‘ү https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander

Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:
Writer - Director: Srikanth Odela
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Chief Co-Director & Additional Screenplay: Vinay Sagar Jonnala
Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .
Color By: Redchillies.Color
Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin
Brand Agency Partner - MMM Media Works 

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: Spending $8,592,587 For The STRONGEST KICK In Roblox!
snippet.description:
Today I broke down doors in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! рҹҳұ
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! рҹҳұ

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. вқӨпёҸ

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.

snippet.title: рҹӨ”aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye рҹҳұ Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d
snippet.description:
рҹӨ”aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye рҹҳұ Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d


What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In todayвҖҷs action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselvesвҖ”Sourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, weвҖҷve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
ItвҖҷs not just a solo trip! WeвҖҷve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

The Mission: Delivering a Ferrari via train.
The Guests: Sourav Joshi, Piyush, and Kunal.
The Crew: Shinchan, Doraemon, and Chacha.
The Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D (Indian Simulator).
#Hashtags:
#IndianBikesDriving3D #SouravJoshiVlogs #PiyushJoshiGaming #IndianSimulator #DoraemonInIndia #ShinchanFunnyMoments #FerrariGift #GamingCrossover #TrainMission #SouravJoshi #VillageVlog #IndianGamingCommunity

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
вҖңNachanaвҖқ is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. рҹ’ғрҹҸҪрҹ•әрҹҸҪ
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take overвҖ”when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, вҖңNachanaвҖқ brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobodyвҖҷs watching.

рҹҺ§ Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show вҖ” just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

WeвҖҷll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy ValentineвҖҷs Day ;)

Keys / Vocals вҖ” Yabesh Thapa
Female BV вҖ” Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar вҖ” John Tamang
Drums вҖ” Stifler
Bass вҖ” Av Kc
Electric Guitar вҖ” Roshan Lama
Sarangi вҖ” Kiran Maharjan
Flute вҖ” Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer вҖ” Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master вҖ” Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

В© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Unclogging DRAINS to SAVE A CITY from FLOOD!
snippet.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be Unclogging drains to save a city from a huge flood in Drain Sim gameplay. Can I unclog many plugged street drains in this satisfying simulator game before the whole city is flooded? (They gave me a bucket for this) This is Drain Sim the game! 

Follow Me On EVERYWHERE! *Not on streets please :')*
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/imbixu/
Discord (Must Join) : https://discord.gg/imbixu
Twitter : https://twitter.com/IMBixu1

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, IвҖҷm Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, IвҖҷve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, IвҖҷve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete рҹ§ў
BGIS 2025 Runner up рҹҘҲ
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP рҹ‘‘
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up рҹҘү
BGMS 2022 MVP рҹҸҶ
BGMS 2022 Runner up рҹҘҲ
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger рҹҺҜ
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger рҹ’Ј
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger рҹ’Ј
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger рҹҺҜ
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up рҹҘҲ
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger рҹҺҜ
PMIS 2020 India Champions рҹҸҶ
PMCO 2019 Fall SplitВ SAВ ChampionВ рҹҸҶ

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC FloвҖҷs mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

вҖңEvery line I write is a dedication long overdue!вҖқ

snippet.title: AC Milan vs Inter Milan SQUAD BUILDER BATTLE вҖ” FC Mobile Milan Derby!
snippet.description:
The Takeover Showdown Series is HERE! Episode 3 вҖ” Milan Derby. Me vs @VishyFC. AC Milan vs Inter Milan. We each get 20 Billion coins to build a squad using only past or present club players who played for at least 2 seasons. No tradeables, no training вҖ” market bought players only. 3 guesses each to sabotage the other squad. 2 protected players each. Then we go Head to Head вҖ” home leg and away leg. 12 points available across OVR, aggregate, golden boot and clean sheets. All counting towards $1,000 across the full 6 episode series!

Points System:
вӯҗ 5 points вҖ” Highest OVR team
вҡҪ 3 points вҖ” Win the aggregate
рҹҘҮ 2 points вҖ” Golden boot winner
рҹӣЎпёҸ 1 point per clean sheet

вҸұпёҸ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 вҖ” Intro & Series Rules
00:19 вҖ” Series Standings
01:36 вҖ” Building The Inter Milan Squad (Vishy)
04:37 вҖ” Building The AC Milan Squad (RK)
08:23 вҖ” Squad Reveal & Guessing Challenge
14:58 вҖ” First Leg
18:00 вҖ” Second Leg & Final Score
18:30 вҖ” Points Breakdown & Updated Leaderboard

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you

But I hope I never see them again

I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

In the backseat of your Rover

Lyrics of this song "JUSTIN BIEBER" -
 
Female - 
Ghadi me baje 5 sham ke chore ka na pata thikana
Roley hath me saje jaat ke lambo niche sheher diwana
Ve m rehna tere naal meherma, ve m tere bul di khayal meherma
Mere ve har haal rahega dil ke bhitar tu
Balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin bieber tu-2

Male - 
Gaadi Aadi tedi chaale 
system maare naam te haale 
Bolero aale maare sale 
Bteyu g weagon te aare
Konsa bole maare aage 
Us bande na dar na laage 
Haryana se hollywood takk
Rukka raoshab ka baaje  
Ham to desi ghee aale
Ye saale khali bore hain
Naam ki gelya leke fere
Katiye pagal hore hain
Re Inki game ghuma rakhi
Lathi 4 chadha rakhi
Ye jo bane fire  hai saap 
Yaar ne been baja rakhi

Female - 
Gaadi lakh dallar ki niche duniya fan bna rakhi
Apna chain mai hari tne mahri neend uda rakhi
Sare deewane mere piche m diwani tere peeche
Pakad le baiyan dil me saiyan teri jagah bna rakhi
Jab chale kaafila caara ka kath challe gel hazara ka
Mne ghana favourite lage jo tu pehne outfit zara ka
O mne krega pagal saiyan mera bne kaatil josa lave ittar tu

O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin beiber tu-2

Male - 
Ghne handle kre ilaake yaar tera 
System phaad ke raakhe yaar tera 
Kyi bando ko hazam na hove 
Duniya peeche rakhe yaar tera 

desi chore gaama ke 
Zikar hai mehnge daama me 
Niche chahe g Wagon hai 
FAN HAI AAJ BHI YAMHA KE 

Seedhi seedhi bat h baby
Na kise cheez ki ghaat h baby
Jiske jyada khaaj lagri
Mere pas ilaaj h baby

Jaave mall trackter pe 
Chora kam na kisi bhi actor te Tere shehar m aave raosahab jab
Bawli Jaam lag ja h sector me

Meri Ammi dhunde var mere tayi
Saakh modti chali m
Tere yara ki bhabhi banna teri bnu
gharwali m
Na kisi bat ki fikr krenge maze sath
me zikar krenge
Tere sath hi jana chahti saiyan trip
pe bali m
Haath me rakh hath bawle pyar ki
kar 2 bat bawle
Pache na ho nyu...o balma
O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage
justin beiber tu-2

snippet.title: Escaping Papa PizzaвҖҷs Pizzeria Shop In Roblox рҹҚ•рҹҚ•
snippet.description:
Follow Me On Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/iamkhaleelyt
Watch More Videos : https://www.youtube.com/@Iamkhaleel2

I am Khaleel Present : Escape Papa Pizza's Pizzeria! (SCARY OBBY) вҖ“ Roblox Horror Escape Gameplay

A brand new pizzeria just opened in townвҖҰ but something feels very wrong. 

Welcome to Escape Papa Pizza's Pizzeria! (SCARY OBBY), a creepy Roblox horror obby where players must escape a terrifying restaurant filled with traps, obstacles, and a deadly secret ingredientвҖҰ HUMAN!

In this scary Roblox adventure, you accidentally get trapped inside Papa PizzaвҖҷs Pizzeria. Now you must complete challenging obby stages, avoid deadly machines, and survive while being chased by the evil chef Papa Pizza. Can you escape before you become the next ingredient in his pizza? 

This game mixes parkour obstacle courses, horror elements, and jump scares, making it one of the most intense escape obby experiences on Roblox. Players must run, jump, and think fast to make it through the pizzeria and reach freedom.

The evil chef Papa Pizza runs the pizzeria and secretly turns people into pizza ingredients, making him the main villain you must avoid while escaping the restaurant.

Will you escape the pizzeria aliveвҖҰ or become the next pizza topping?

Game Features

Scary Roblox Obby Adventure
Mild Jump Scares & Horror Moments
Challenging Parkour Obstacles
Escape From The Evil Chef Papa Pizza
Fun Multiplayer Roblox Gameplay

snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic вҖ“ the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
IвҖҷll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldnвҖҷt climb
It's crazy but itвҖҷs true. ThereвҖҷs nothing I won't do. 
IвҖҷd risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
IвҖҷm trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh iвҖҷll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heartвҖҷs on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but itвҖҷs true. There's nothing I wonвҖҷt do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ainвҖҷt a mountain you could point to I wouldnвҖҷt climb

It's crazy but itвҖҷs true. There's nothing I wonвҖҷt do
IвҖҷd risk it all for you (2x)

Join BrunoвҖҷs mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop BrunoвҖҷs official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMYВ®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for вҖңDie with a SmileвҖқ with Lady Gaga and вҖңAPT.вҖқ with ROSГү, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010вҖҷs вҖңJust the Way You AreвҖқ). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMYВ® Awards (including вҖңAlbum of the YearвҖқ for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаҘңаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ | Holi Bhajan #holi
snippet.description:
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаҘңаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ | Holi Bhajan

radha krishna holi song,radha krishna bhajan,holi bhajan,vrindavan me ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan me ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan holi bhajan,vrindavan ki holi,holiya me ude re gulal bhajan,shyam holi geet,kanha ji holi bhajan,kanha ji holi song,radha krishna holi bhajan 2025,radha krishna holi bhajan,krishna songs,krishna bhajan,holi ke bhajan,holi bhajan krishna,bhajan 

аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ,
аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮвҖҰ.

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ,
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ,
аӨЁаӨҹаӨ–аӨҹ аӨЁаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ,
аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ,
аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ,
аӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ® аӨёаӨІаҘӢаӨЁаҘҮ аӨЁаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ,
аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҘаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,
аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҒаӨҹ аӨЁаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ,
аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ

аӨҡаҘҒаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ,

аӨөаҘғаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҘаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,

аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҘаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,
аӨҡаҘҒаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ,

аӨҡаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аӨЈ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨӘ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӯаӨ—аӨөаӨҫаӨЁ Vishnu аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ®аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

вҖңаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ®аӨЁ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨЈ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨЈ аӨ№аӨ°аӨҝ аӨ№аӨ°аӨҝвҖқ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨӯаӨ—аӨөаӨҫаӨЁ Vishnu аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ аӨӘаӨөаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ®-аӨёаҘҚаӨ®аӨ°аӨЈ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҡаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аӨЈ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨҮаӨё аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨөаӨЈ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨёаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨҠаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аӨІ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

рҹҷҸ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨӯаӨөаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨҮаӨё аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨөаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫаӨөаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

рҹ”” аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨңаӨҜ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ®аӨЁ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨЈ рҹҷҸ
